_comment: Hook commands use the ECC pattern: node -e searches for plugin root using utils.js as marker, then splices plugin-hook-bootstrap.js into argv[1] and requires it. This ensures hooks work regardless of CWD.

hooks.command: node -e "const p=require('path');const r=(()=>{var e=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT;if(e&&e.trim())return e.trim();var p=require('path'),f=require('fs'),h=require('os').homedir(),d=p.join(h,'.claude'),q=p.join('scripts','lib','utils.js');if(f.existsSync(p.join(d,q)))return d;for(var s of [['claude-toolkit'],['claude-toolkit@claude-toolkit'],['marketplaces','claude-toolkit']]){var l=p.join(d,'plugins',...s);if(f.existsSync(p.join(l,q)))return l}try{for(var g of ['claude-toolkit']){var b=p.join(d,'plugins','cache',g);for(var o of f.readdirSync(b,{withFileTypes:true})){if(!o.isDirectory())continue;for(var v of f.readdirSync(p.join(b,o.name),{withFileTypes:true})){if(!v.isDirectory())continue;var c=p.join(b,o.name,v.name);if(f.existsSync(p.join(c,q)))return c}}}}catch(x){}return d})();const s=p.join(r,'scripts/hooks/plugin-hook-bootstrap.js');process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT=r;process.argv.splice(1,0,s);require(s)" node scripts/hooks/run-with-flags.js session:start scripts/hooks/session-start.js minimal,standard,strict

SessionStart.description: Load previous context and detect package manager on new session

hooks.command: node -e "const p=require('path');const r=(()=>{var e=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT;if(e&&e.trim())return e.trim();var p=require('path'),f=require('fs'),h=require('os').homedir(),d=p.join(h,'.claude'),q=p.join('scripts','lib','utils.js');if(f.existsSync(p.join(d,q)))return d;for(var s of [['claude-toolkit'],['claude-toolkit@claude-toolkit'],['marketplaces','claude-toolkit']]){var l=p.join(d,'plugins',...s);if(f.existsSync(p.join(l,q)))return l}try{for(var g of ['claude-toolkit']){var b=p.join(d,'plugins','cache',g);for(var o of f.readdirSync(b,{withFileTypes:true})){if(!o.isDirectory())continue;for(var v of f.readdirSync(p.join(b,o.name),{withFileTypes:true})){if(!v.isDirectory())continue;var c=p.join(b,o.name,v.name);if(f.existsSync(p.join(c,q)))return c}}}}catch(x){}return d})();const s=p.join(r,'scripts/hooks/plugin-hook-bootstrap.js');process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT=r;process.argv.splice(1,0,s);require(s)" node scripts/hooks/run-with-flags.js pre:edit-write:suggest-compact scripts/hooks/suggest-compact.js standard,strict

PreToolUse.description: Suggest manual compaction at logical intervals

PreToolUse.description: Capture tool use observations for continuous learning

PostToolUse.description: Track per-session tool calls and file activity

Stop.description: Persist session state after each response
